name: TUI Panel
description: The fundamental structural unit of the ION TUI dashboard. A square-cornered rectangular region with a 1px solid border, a compact uppercase header strip, and a body content area. Panels stack vertically in sidebars and form the three-column grid skeleton. No drop shadows on static panels — depth is conveyed by border + background elevation only.

anatomy.description: 1px solid var(--color-border) rectangle, no border-radius (sharp corners). Background var(--color-bg-secondary) default
Top strip: uppercase label, var(--text-xs), color var(--color-text-muted), letter-spacing 0.08em, padding var(--space-1) var(--space-3). Optional right-aligned count or action hint
Content area below header, padding var(--space-2), scrollable when content overflows
When state=active, box-shadow var(--shadow-glow) + border-color var(--color-border-accent)

structurePatterns: border-radius: 0 (sharp corners are mandatory for TUI aesthetic)
usageHints: Primary building block for sidebar sections, right-panel widgets, and main content regions
Nest panels vertically with a 1px var(--color-divider) separator, not a gap
Active/focused panel uses border-accent + glow shadow; all others stay flat
doNotInvent: Never add border-radius — this breaks the terminal aesthetic
Never use drop shadows on static panels; glow shadow is reserved for active/focused state only
Do not add gradient backgrounds; flat solid colors only
